auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Mailchimp Marketing API key used with HTTP Basic auth. Generate it under Profile > Extras > API keys: https://mailchimp.com/help/about-api-keys/.

actions.name: archive_member
actions.description: Archive a Mailchimp member from the specified audience/list.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

inputSchema.description: Mailchimp member locator for archiving a member.

outputSchema.description: Success marker returned after a Mailchimp no-content response.

actions.name: delete_member_permanently
actions.description: Permanently delete a Mailchimp member from the specified audience/list.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

inputSchema.description: Mailchimp member locator for permanently deleting a member.

outputSchema.description: Success marker returned after a Mailchimp no-content response.

actions.name: get_list
actions.description: Fetch a single Mailchimp audience/list by ID.

inputSchema.description: Path parameters for fetching a single Mailchimp audience/list.

outputSchema.description: Single Mailchimp audience/list response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: get_member
actions.description: Fetch a single Mailchimp member by subscriber hash or email address.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

inputSchema.description: Mailchimp list identifier plus either a subscriber hash or an email address.

outputSchema.description: Single Mailchimp member response normalized by the connector.

actions.name: list_lists
actions.description: List Mailchimp audiences/lists visible to the current API key.

count.description: Maximum number of items to return.

offset.description: Number of items to skip before collecting the response page.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Mailchimp audiences/lists.

lists.description: Array of lists returned by the official Mailchimp API.

total_items.description: Total number of items reported by the official Mailchimp API.

items.description: Hypermedia link object returned by Mailchimp.

_links.description: Hypermedia links returned by the official Mailchimp API.

actions.name: list_member_tags
actions.description: List tags currently attached to a Mailchimp member.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

inputSchema.description: Mailchimp member locator for listing tags.

tags.description: Array of tags returned by the official Mailchimp API.

total_items.description: Total number of items reported by the official Mailchimp API.

items.description: Hypermedia link object returned by Mailchimp.

_links.description: Hypermedia links returned by the official Mailchimp API.

actions.name: list_members
actions.description: List members in a Mailchimp audience/list.

count.description: Maximum number of items to return.

offset.description: Number of items to skip before collecting the response page.

status.description: Mailchimp member status value accepted by the official API.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing members in a Mailchimp audience/list.

members.description: Array of members returned by the official Mailchimp API.

total_items.description: Total number of items reported by the official Mailchimp API.

items.description: Hypermedia link object returned by Mailchimp.

_links.description: Hypermedia links returned by the official Mailchimp API.

actions.name: list_merge_fields
actions.description: List merge fields defined for a Mailchimp audience/list.

count.description: Maximum number of items to return.

offset.description: Number of items to skip before collecting the response page.

inputSchema.description: Query parameters for listing Mailchimp merge fields.

items.description: Merge field object returned by Mailchimp.

merge_fields.description: Array of merge_fields returned by the official Mailchimp API.

total_items.description: Total number of items reported by the official Mailchimp API.

items.description: Hypermedia link object returned by Mailchimp.

_links.description: Hypermedia links returned by the official Mailchimp API.

actions.name: update_member
actions.description: Patch an existing Mailchimp member by subscriber hash or email address.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

skip_merge_validation.description: Whether Mailchimp should skip merge-field validation during the write request.

merge_fields.description: Merge fields object accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

status.description: Mailchimp member status value accepted by the official API.

vip.description: Whether Mailchimp should mark the member as VIP.

language.description: Preferred language code accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

email_type.description: Email content type accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for patching an existing Mailchimp member.

member.description: Member object returned by Mailchimp after the update request.

outputSchema.description: Single Mailchimp member response normalized after an update request.

actions.name: update_member_tags
actions.description: Add or remove Mailchimp member tags using the official tag-update endpoint.

subscriber_hash.description: Lowercase MD5 hash of the subscriber email address accepted by Mailchimp.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

name.description: Tag name accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

status.description: Tag state accepted by the official Mailchimp member-tags endpoint.

tags.description: Tag updates to submit to Mailchimp.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for updating Mailchimp member tags.

outputSchema.description: Success marker returned after a Mailchimp no-content response.

actions.name: upsert_member
actions.description: Add or update a Mailchimp member using the official upsert endpoint.

email_address.description: Subscriber email address used by Mailchimp to derive the subscriber hash.

status_if_new.description: Mailchimp member status value accepted by the official API.

skip_merge_validation.description: Whether Mailchimp should skip merge-field validation during the write request.

merge_fields.description: Merge fields object accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

status.description: Mailchimp member status value accepted by the official API.

vip.description: Whether Mailchimp should mark the member as VIP.

language.description: Preferred language code accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

email_type.description: Email content type accepted by the official Mailchimp API.

inputSchema.description: Request payload for Mailchimp add-or-update member requests.

member.description: Member object returned by Mailchimp after the upsert request.

outputSchema.description: Single Mailchimp member response normalized after an upsert request.
